query: I'm starting a new project to predict customer churn from a tabular dataset. Python 3.13, scikit-learn. The repo is empty. Walk me through the scaffold.
expected_behavior: Specifies a pinned pyproject.toml (or equivalent) with requires-python pinned to 3.13 and direct dependencies pinned (e.g., ~= or ==) rather than unbounded
Includes a src/<pkg>/seed.py multi-library seed helper AND a starter notebook that imports and calls set_seed() in cell 1
Includes a .gitignore that ignores data/raw/ (and ideally data/processed/) so dataset files are not committed to git
